title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 172.810 - State cancer center, may be transferred to University of Missouri, how
text:
172.810.  State cancer center, may be transferred to University of Missouri, how. — The State Cancer Center may be transferred to the curators of the University of Missouri from the department of health and senior services by agreement between the state cancer commission and the board of curators.
(L. 1990 H.B. 1725 merged with S.B. 737) 
Effective 11-1-90
